title: PowerUp SYBR Green qPCR
description: Applied Biosystems SYBR Green 20 uL qPCR: UDG + Dual-Lock activation, standard 2-step cycling, with a melt-curve (dissociation) stage.

ingredients.name: DNA template (1-10 ng cDNA or 10-100 ng gDNA)

payload.notes: SYBR Green chemistry (intercalating dye), so include the melt-curve / dissociation stage above to verify amplicon specificity. Cycling shown is Standard mode (primer Tm >= 60 C); for Fast mode use 95 C for 1-3 sec denature and 60 C for 30 sec anneal/extend. Use Standard cycling for genomic DNA templates and on the 7900HT and 7500 instruments. Primers 300-800 nM each (final); 1-10 ng cDNA or 10-100 ng gDNA per reaction. For primer Tm < 60 C use a 3-step protocol (95 C 15 sec, anneal 55-60 C 15 sec, 72 C 1 min). Passive reference dye: ROX. Source: PowerUp SYBR Green Master Mix Quick Reference (MAN0028468), https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/MAN0028468-PowerUpSYBRGreenMM-QR.pdf
